response:
you can warp this svg by applying a filter element with a feconvolvematrix or using a transform attribute on the path elements to skew or rotate the shapes. another method involves adding a foreignobject containing html canvas to draw the distorted version dynamically while keeping the original structure intact.

***

for more complex distortions consider using a mesh filter or a displacement map that references an image to push and pull the coordinates of the path data. this approach allows you to create organic warping effects without manually recalculating every single point in the path definition.
